chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No. D- 2929 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE. 1. For order on CMA No. 14818/23 (U/A) 2. For order on office objection No. 2, 7, 16, 19 & 28. 3. For order on CMA No. 14022/23 (Exemption) 4. For order on CMA No. 14023/23 (stay) 5. For hearing of main case. -------------- 22.06.2023. Mr. Muhammad Daud Narejo, Advocate for Petitioner. ----------------------- 1. Granted. 2 to 5. Since the main prayer is regarding harassment; whereas, Petitioner has failed to approach the Justice of Peace; hence petition is not maintainable in view of judgment reported as Abdul Hameed and another Vs. Province of Sindh through Secretary Home Department and 8 others (PLD 2019 Sindh 168) and is accordingly dismissed; whereas, the Petitioner may avail alternate remedy as above. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
